description: After you successfully execute a command, a DBot message appears in the War Room with the command details.

outputs.description: Unique identifier of the event. SAPBTP.Event.user User associated with the event.
outputs.name: SAPBTP.Event.uuid

outputs.description: Date Timestamp of the event. SAPBTP.Event.ip
outputs.name: SAPBTP.Event.time

outputs.description: IP address associated with the event. SAPBTP.Event.data Event data payload.
outputs.name: String
